title: arthraxon ciliaris var. genuinus
intro: Arthraxon ciliaris var. genuinus, also known as Chinese star grass, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Chinese star grass include its ability to relieve joint pain and swelling, improve circulation, and support the immune system. The herbal preparation of Chinese star grass is typically made by boiling the roots and rhizomes, which can be consumed as a tea or used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
